rationale: The cited paper is used to support key modeling premises in the citing paper, not just as a generic list citation. Specifically, it is cited when justifying brand-level competitive diffusion modeling and again when discussing how switching/attrition can bias customer value assessments. These uses inform the citing paper's conceptual setup and interpretation of retention effects, even though the cited model is not directly re-estimated or replicated.
relation_description: The citing paper draws on Libai et al. (2009a) as prior foundation that competitive diffusion with attrition/switching matters for customer equity and diffusion interpretation. This foundation supports the citing paper's competitive diffusion framing and its retention-related discussion in the seeding context.
